description: Anthropic Messages streaming with MCP (Model Context Protocol) dynamic tools executed by the provider. Validates `dynamic=true` tool-input parts, tool-call emission, and tool-result mapping.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: MCP tool calls must be marked as dynamic in v3 parts.
Provider-executed tools must not be surfaced as locally executable function tool calls.
